releaseNotes: 4.9.5: UI overhaul Phase D-G. Tool cards: status dots (running blink/done/error) + expandable truncated output. Error card: danger bar + icon + copy/retry. Thinking block: markdown rendering. Slash commands: full system aggregating built-ins + skills + agent tools + MCP tools, with live completion popup (Tab/Enter/Up/Down/Esc). Input: command history (Up/Down), dynamic placeholder. Context gauge: compact warning at >80%. Global CJK font (YaHei UI). Chat bubbles: elevation shadows + hover lift. Day-grouped timeline.
